itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Removed explicit maven-compiler-plugin configuration block, likely relying on parent POM or default settings for the new JDK version.
itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.human_impl: Deleted the <plugin> block for maven-compiler-plugin including source/target/annotationProcessorPaths configuration.

itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed Lombok dependency scope from 'provided' to default (compile), ensuring it is included in the classpath at runtime or test time if needed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 11 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Lombok to version 1.18.34 to ensure compatibility and security with the newer JDK.
Replace the legacy coveralls-maven-plugin with omni-coveragereporter-maven-plugin to modernize coverage reporting.
Remove the explicit jaxb-api dependency which was previously required by the old coveralls plugin.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI Docker image from OpenJDK 11 to Eclipse Temurin 21 to align with the target Java version.
Install Maven via apk because the new Alpine-based image does not include it by default.
Install make via apk to satisfy build requirements in the new Alpine environment.
Clean up outdated documentation and comments from the CI configuration file.
.circleci/config.yml.human_impl: Removed comments like '# Java Maven CircleCI 2.0 configuration file' and '# run tests!'
